privileged_info_summary: Task requires creating a synthetic business partner in iDempiere's GardenWorld client. The business partner has search key RIVERSIDE01, name 'Riverside Landscaping Co.', and is classified as a customer with a credit limit of 50000. The billing address is located in Portland, Oregon with ZIP code 97201 at '742 Garden Vista Drive'. A contact person named Michael Chen (Owner title, phone 503-555-7892, email mchen@riverside-landscaping.com) must be added. All data values are synthetic test data created for GUI automation testing within iDempiere ERP.
